evaluation_method: manual checklist over actual candidate outputs

rejected_for_primary.C01: usable but below revised quality-equivalence threshold and weaker than C05 on specificity and handoff detail
rejected_for_primary.C02: near miss but score is below 90 and method/future-route detail is materially thinner than C05
rejected_for_primary.C03: gpt-5.5 low is usable but omits a separate simulation owner followup and falls below 90 percent of C05

primary_decision: C04 is selected over C05 because both are quality_equivalent_pass and C04 has materially lower output tokens, reasoning tokens, and wall time while preserving required gaps, followups, provenance, and boundary notes.
